hero.title: Experience True Relaxation
hero.subtitle: Authentic Thai massage for your health and well-being. Restore your body and mind in our serene and private atmosphere.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Choose the perfect package for your ultimate relaxation.

thaiMassage.title: Traditional Thai Massage
thaiMassage.desc: Relieve muscle tension and improve blood circulation with ancient techniques.

oilMassage.title: Aroma Oil Massage
oilMassage.desc: Relax with natural essential oils to promote deep sleep and relaxation.

footMassage.title: Foot Reflexology
footMassage.desc: Stimulate internal organs and relieve fatigue from long walks or standing.

safety.title: Important Safety Information
safety.desc: For your safety, please inform our staff if you have any underlying health conditions, are pregnant, or have recently had surgery before receiving a massage.
